summary: The kernel is stated as the necessity condition for governed construction and all AASC machinery is downstream consequence.
The manuscript presents branch exclusion as AASC-internal and Cook-Levin/Karp only as endpoint correspondence after CnfSATInPolyTime is obtained.
Clay-valid is defined only in the official mathematical endpoint sense and not as a procedural claim.
SepImg is aligned directly with CnfSATImageSeparatorBranch and the raw negative branch maps to SepImg by the formal lower-bound/no-positive bridge.
SepIndBridge and NoSepDisc are invoked inside the image-separator contradiction chain rather than as freestanding consequences of context alone.
The manuscript states explicitly that SepImg is theorem-bearing endpoint use before applying kernel-forced no-independent-discriminator closure.
Draft-style bridge language and obsolete residual/reportability/lower-standing routes were removed from the main proof spine.
